stemHtml: Consider two different aircraft: a single-engine piston (SEP) producing 160 hp and a weight of 1300 lb, and a multi-engine piston (MEP) with two engines, each with 160 hp and a weight of 1900 lb. In the event of an engine failure, which of these aircraft would perform better?

options.a: Both aircraft would perform similarly in the event of an engine failure.
options.b: The SEP aircraft is due to its lighter weight and simpler configuration.
options.c: The SEP aircraft is due to its higher power-to-weight ratio compared to the MEP.
options.d: The MEP aircraft due to its redundancy.
